examples: The plan was fatally flawed from the start.
Movies did, however, fatally impact some parts of live theater.
Failure now could fatally damage his chances in the future.
In 1993, Ruben Cantu was executed in Texas for fatally shooting a man during a robbery.
Malakai McKenzie, was fatally injured outside The Hubb on Sherwood on 21 April 2012.
